member.name: T:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PluginAttribute
member.summary: A Plugin property in a Test Method should be decorated with this attribute.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PluginAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The pluginType, which is the interface of the Plugin.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PrimeEnvVariableAttribute
member.summary: An attribute to document on a usage of specific env variable in Prime.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PrimeEnvVariableAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: the name of the object using this env variable (Test Method or Service name).
short description on the usage of this env variable.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PrimeEnvVariableAttribute.UsedBy
member.summary: Gets the name of the object using this env variable (Test Method or Service name).

member.name: P:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PrimeEnvVariableAttribute.Description
member.summary: Gets short description on the usage of that env variable.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PrimeEnvVariableAttribute.IsRequired
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the user var is required or not.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PrimeEnvVariableAttribute.DefaultBehaviorWhenNotExist
member.summary: Gets or sets a description of what will be the behavior when the user not exist. This is needed only when IsRequired=false.

member.name: T:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PrimeUserVarAttribute
member.summary: An attribute to document on a usage of specific uservar name in Prime.

member.name: M:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PrimeUserVarAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: the collection name of the uservar.
the name of the object using this uservar (Test Method or Service name).
short description on the usage of that uservar.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PrimeUserVarAttribute.Collection
member.summary: Gets the collection name of the uservar.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PrimeUserVarAttribute.UsedBy
member.summary: Gets the name of the object using this uservar (Test Method or Service name).

member.name: P:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PrimeUserVarAttribute.Description
member.summary: Gets short description on the usage of env variable uservar.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PrimeUserVarAttribute.IsRequired
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the user var is required or not.

member.name: P:Prime.Base.PrimeAttributes.PrimeUserVarAttribute.DefaultBehaviorWhenNotExist
member.summary: Gets or sets a description of what will be the behavior when the user not exist. This is needed only when IsRequired=false.
